home.matrixSubtitle: We cluster our products into three coherent groups — each addressing a distinct layer of modern work — and sharpen every one with the same platform team.

collaboration.title: For teams that build together.
collaboration.sub: Self-hostable project, task, and OKR tooling that keeps work synced across timezones.

ai-dev.title: For the people who ship code.
ai-dev.sub: Agentic IDEs, cross-platform runtimes, and delivery infrastructure for developer teams.

vertical-ai.title: For the real, messy world.
vertical-ai.sub: Narrow AI products solving specific, human problems end-to-end — not chatbots.

hero.lede: Hitosea (海豚有海) is a studio of three bets and one stubborn belief — that the most durable software is built alongside its community. From team collaboration to agentic coding to vertical AI, our suite is open at the core and production-grade at the edges.

opensource.manifestoTitle: The best software is built with, not behind, its community.
opensource.manifestoP1: Every Hitosea product ships with a permissive license, a public roadmap, and a steady cadence of changelogs. When you adopt Hitosea, you inherit a codebase — and a community that reviews it every day.
opensource.manifestoP2: We take pull requests like we take bug reports: seriously, quickly, and with a reply from a human engineer. No gatekeepers, no enterprise-edition traps.
opensource.title: We believe in open source
opensource.lede: Every core product at Hitosea is open source. From DooTask to MenuRay, we believe auditable, self-hostable, customizable software is the future of enterprise software.

whyUs.title: Four principles we refuse to compromise on.
whyUs.subtitle: We optimize for a specific kind of customer: engineering-led teams that value transparency, self-hostability, and the right to leave.

openSource.title: Fully Open Source
openSource.desc: Every product is public on GitHub under a permissive license. Fork it, audit it, self-host it — no permission required, no enterprise-edition gotchas.

enterprise.title: Enterprise Ready
enterprise.desc: SSO, audit logs, and on-prem deployments ship from day one — serving finance, government, and regulated industries with production-grade defaults.

matrix.title: A Product Suite
matrix.desc: One design language, one identity layer. Adopt one to start — integrate the rest when you are ready. No forced platforms.

devFriendly.title: Developer First
devFriendly.desc: Everything has an API, a CLI, and a webhook. We sweat the DX so your teams spend their time shipping — not configuring vendor dashboards.

cta.preLabel: Get started · No email required to browse
cta.title: Ready to bring Hitosea to your team?

openSource.heroLede: Our code, product roadmap, and issue tracking are all public. Join us — start by starring a repo.
openSource.communityGithub: Discuss on GitHub Discussions, share best practices, propose ideas
openSource.communityWeChat: WeChat group (add our bot to request an invite)
openSource.contributeDesc: Each repo includes a CONTRIBUTING.md with issue, development, and PR instructions.

about.heroLede: A group of engineers who believe open source can change enterprise software.
about.missionBody: Use open-source, modular products to help teams spend their energy on what truly creates value — not building infrastructure, but shipping better products and serving more customers.
about.doBody: We build three product lines that reinforce each other: enterprise collaboration (centered on DooTask), AI & developer tools (Happy Next, eeui, DooPush), and vertical AI products (MenuRay, Qiujian, TTPOS). Every product is open-source, self-hostable, and enterprise-ready.
about.joinBody: If you believe in open source and love shipping products, we'd like to meet you. Send your résumé to:

contact.heroLede: Want to explore self-hosted deployment, custom development, or partnerships? Leave your info and we'll get back within one business day.

form.name: Name
form.messagePlaceholder: Team size, use cases, target deployment timeline, etc.
form.success: Got it — we'll reach out soon!
form.errorGeneric: Submission failed. Please retry or email us directly.
